summary: Verified governance-only reconciliation of the GAP-0002 capability chain. CAP-0009 now records its actual opt-in context-pack implementation commit, interfaces, source files, admission warrant, and bounded integration semantics. CAP-0011 no longer recommends already-completed plan work. GAP-0002 remains open and now identifies compact distance-aware representation, budget behavior, isolated targets, target selection, and local/global balance as the next evidence questions. No runtime code was changed.
